title: DeskPilot — Local-First macOS Productivity Assistant
description: Native macOS productivity hub with an on-device AI assistant that calls deterministic app tools for notes, calendar, reminders, and recent files. Local MLX-LM server (Qwen3-4B) provides an OpenAI-compatible chat backend with deterministic fallback when offline. Hybrid lexical + semantic-style retrieval powers Notes search; EventKit integration drives Calendar and Tasks. Full unit and UI test coverage via XCTest/XCUITest with a custom test runner.
stack: Swift, SwiftUI, EventKit, Python, MLX-LM, XCTest, XCUITest

title: Sirius — Private On-Device Health AI
description: Won Best Security Infrastructure at the O1 Summit Hackathon ($1K). A fully private AI health assistant — LLM inference, speech recognition, health memory, and device sync all run locally on Apple Silicon. Built the macOS app end to end in SwiftUI with a FastAPI backend running Gemma 4 via MLX. P2P device sync over Bluetooth/Wi-Fi with AES-256-GCM encrypted health memory.
stack: Swift, SwiftUI, Python, FastAPI, MLX, GRDB, NLEmbedding, PDFKit, SSE

title: StatViz — AI-Assisted Exploratory Data Analysis
description: MSCS capstone (advised by Dr. Qianwen Wang). Browser-based tool guiding users from raw datasets to structured insights via a node-based canvas — no code required. OpenAI function-calling with intent classification; client-side stats engine (Pearson correlation, Welch's t-test, chi-square, ANOVA). Raw data never leaves the browser.
stack: React, React Flow, Zustand, Vite, OpenAI API, jstat, GitHub Pages

title: MinneDigest — AI-Powered Journalism Suite
description: Won the AI × Journalism Hackathon ($10K grant, Hacks/Hackers). Production journalism suite with automated news ingestion, RAG-ready content store, PDF-to-news conversion, and AI fact-checking pipeline. Dual-persona podcast format where AI agents discuss news conversationally. Reduced content creation time by 85%.
stack: LangGraph, LangChain, FastAPI, ElevenLabs, Whisper, Ollama, RAG

title: ProdLens — Intelligent E-Commerce Query System
description: Hybrid PostgreSQL + ChromaDB (HNSW) database; ~1ms latency across 1,024 products, 122 brands, 2,500+ reviews. 80% API cost reduction via batched LangChain ETL. LangGraph routing across Text-to-SQL, RAG with metadata filtering, and conversational flows; HuggingFace BERT sentiment analysis.
stack: PostgreSQL, ChromaDB, LangGraph, OpenAI, HuggingFace BERT, Streamlit

title: Real-Time World Model for Vehicle Teleoperation
description: Vehicle-centric world model augmenting teleoperation by combining map structure, perception outputs, and spatial context into a unified 3D interface. Deep learning–based object detection + LiDAR localization transmit structured scene semantics instead of raw sensor data to a browser-based visualization.
stack: Python, ROS 2, rosbridge, LiDAR, Object Detection, WebGL

title: Real-Time Situational-Awareness Alert System
description: 3D intersection awareness HUD visualizing real-time AV data streamed via ROS 2, showing detected positions and latency-compensated ghost projections. Dynamic map adaptation via OSM road geometries at runtime; coordinate calibration per data stream for accurate spatial rendering across intersections.

title: The California Story — Wildfire Visualization
description: Interactive web app analyzing the impact of environmental and social factors on California wildfires. Integrated GeoJSON with dynamic 3D maps, time-series charts, and interactive visualizations. Python data analysis for wildfire trend extraction.
stack: SvelteJS, D3.js, Plotly.js, CesiumJS, Python, GeoJSON

title: CareerBridge — Resume Sharing Network
description: Social networking app for sharing and discovering resumes. Three user roles (Employer, Job Seeker, Guest) with RBAC via Auth0; tag-based candidate search; resume commenting. Flask + SQLAlchemy backend, PureCSS frontend.
stack: Flask, SQLAlchemy, Auth0, PureCSS, JavaScript, HTML/CSS

title: BookBridge — Books Management Platform
description: Full-stack app for managing personal and collaborative book collections. CRUD for books, note-taking, and book club / meeting management with real-time sync via Firebase.
stack: EmberJS, Firebase (DB, Storage, Auth), JavaScript, Bootstrap

title: AI Enabled FinTech B2B Invoice Management Application
description: Developed a hybrid Random Forest + Linear Regression model to predict invoice payment dates with improved accuracy, incorporating data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model evaluation pipelines in Python. Integrated the predictive model into a dynamic, responsive UI built with React for interactive visualization and real-time insights. Designed and implemented backend components in Java and Servlet with JDBC for secure data access, and connected to a relational DBMS for persistence. Delivered a full-stack solution that combined data science, machine learning, and web technologies to support automated decision-making in B2B financial workflows.
stack: Python, React, Java, JavaScript, Servlet, JDBC, DBMS, HTML, CSS

title: Customer Loan Risk Prediction
description: Built a binary classification model to identify customers at risk of loan default, leveraging Python for data preprocessing, exploratory analysis, feature engineering, and model development. Evaluated multiple supervised learning algorithms to optimize prediction accuracy and interpretability. Delivered a data-driven solution to support risk assessment and decision-making in financial services.

title: Drug Store Invoice Management
description: Designed and implemented a C++ billing system for retail pharmacies, applying principles of object-oriented programming such as encapsulation, inheritance, and polymorphism. The system managed core operations including inventory tracking, customer billing, and receipt generation, demonstrating modular class design and reusable code structure.
